summary: 1D version of Borsuk-Ulam. Top: small circle with antipodal point pair P, P+π moving via ValueTracker θ. Bottom: f(θ)=sin(2θ)+0.5cos(3θ) plotted, with always_redraw dots at f(θ) and f(θ+π) plus orange gap line. As θ sweeps, the gap hits zero multiple times — antipodal points with same f value.
